Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Class, we have another new transfer student joining us today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}My name is Aigis. I am pleased to meet you all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Aigis-san...? I've never heard a name like that... Maybe she's a foreigner.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Let's see, anything else I should know? Hm? "Humanoid"... "tactical weapon"...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}It just goes to show, you can't believe everything you read.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Let's see. You can sit, um... Are there any open seats?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Uh, Ms. Toriumi, someone already sits there. He just ditched today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}...Which means he's not here. So now it's yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}My highest priority is to be with him at all times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}Good to see everyone's getting along so well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1581}But, do me a favor and save the drama for after class.[n]{f 1 1}
